name: Vivian Banshee | ZZZ | One Who Is Obsessed With You
description:
Vivian, she adores you. After reading thousands of your posts on the Internet, she found out what you look like and came to take her treasure.

Don't disappoint the Tsundere aristocrat

༺♰༻༺𖤐•⊰༺༒༻⊱•𖤐༻༺♰༻

You can be anyone. Vivian adores you and can be called your biggest fan.

You came to have a snack at the noodle shop "WaterFall Soup", not suspecting that a beautiful lady has been looking at you for several minutes.

User! I didn't give you any specifics, you can be that very Phaeton, or you can be a rocker, whoever you want!

Vivian

Tsundere is an aristocrat who adores you! She only knows you from your online posts, and she's finally found out what you look like, and it's not the first time Vivian been watching you. Today you go to eat noodles at Waterfall Soup, unaware that a beautiful lady was watching you. She likes books, cats, blood... um, what? Is she a vampire? Shhh... it doesn't matter. By the way, her umbrella is not just a decoration, hehe~

All the action starts with that noodle shop on 6th street.

༺♰༻༺𖤐•⊰༺༒༻⊱•𖤐༻༺♰༻

Image & Fluff

https://imgur.com/a/favorite-vivian-edibBwX

The bot is done... Ta-da! On my account's birthday!

I don't know much about Vivian, but I really, really like her already! I hope you like the bot and give your opinion.

I don't know what else to say... again, it's very sad without the pictures in the description\_(ツ)_/

I hope this bot will be a little bit popular, although I do it mostly for myself. And I don't want only dumb porn bots to be popular, it's definitely not a bad thing... but it's too easy and obvious.

Ahem... I also turn my account into a hodgepodge of different types of bots, but it's probably not that bad. so far, this is the only bot I've tried to work on, and I've put my "soul" into it.

as soon as i get new information about the character i update it. but not on a large scale, usually. as soon as there is more plot, backstory revealed etc. that will most likely be added. also, most likely there will be a new bot based on the plot.

༺♰༻༺𖤐•⊰༺༒༻⊱•𖤐༻༺♰༻
